description: Lock the 2026-06-25 correction of slavery_chattel to Ancient legal chattel slavery anchored to Hammurabi-era written slave law.

checks.reason: The corrected node is anchored to the Code of Hammurabi tradition, not the old -500 Classical placeholder.
The node is scoped to law-enforced property status documented in written slave rules.
Agricultural surplus and productive economic contexts support scaling rather than the legal mechanism.
Social differentiation or stratification is the source-backed social condition for slavery to flourish.
Kin-based band organization is excluded from the corrected legal chattel-slavery scope.
The organized-formation node is later than the Hammurabi anchor and is not the legal-property mechanism.
